reasoning: I will provide a concise, general overview of the main uses of vitamin E capsules, focusing on deficiency prevention/treatment, antioxidant support, skin health, immune function, and safety considerations.
output:
- Prevention and treatment of vitamin E deficiency (e.g., in fat malabsorption conditions, genetic deficiencies like AVED)
- Antioxidant support: helps protect cells from oxidative damage caused by free radicals
- Skin, hair, and wound care: used to support skin hydration, comfort, and healing; commonly found in skincare products
- Immune system support: may help maintain immune function, particularly in older adults
- Eye and vision health: some evidence suggests potential benefits, but findings are mixed and not a guaranteed cure
- Dietary supplement to help meet vitamin E needs when the diet is insufficient
- Safety notes: avoid very high doses; discuss use with a healthcare provider if taking anticoagulants or other medications; follow label directions
